name: Cherry Clafouti with Kirsh
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lbs Dark Sweet Cherries, Stemmed and Pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Melt 4 tablespoons butter in the bottom of a buttered 10-inch quiche pan; reserve 2 tablespoons.
3. Arrange the pitted cherries on the bottom of the buttered pan and set aside.
4. In a small bowl, mix flour and salt.
5. In a large bowl, beat eggs with sugar; add milk, kirsch, and vanilla; beat until well blended.
6. Add reserved melted butter, flour mixture, and salt; beat again.
7. Pour the batter slowly and evenly over the cherries so they are not dislodged.
8. Bake for 5 minutes; reduce heat to 350°F and bake for 45-50 minutes (clafouti is firm, puffed, and golden brown).
9. Serve warm.
